violations.text: Ceiling tile above last aisle in the retail area was observed with water damage and missing tile outside of bathroom area. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2026

The door to the outside, located in the storage room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) Several refrigeration units had spilled food debris 2) Vents had a heavy accumulation of dust 3) Several shelves throughout the retail area had spilled food debris New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024
The receptacle in the unisex restroom is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024
Several ceiling tiles throughout the retail area were observed with water damage (some tiles observed warped). New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
A large amount of lights were out throughout both the retail area and back storage room. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
Ceiling tiles in the establishment were observed in poor repair. Ceiling tiles must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2023
